Techpresso

Apple unveils M5 chip

Apple announced the M5 chip built on a 2nm process (a manufacturing technique where transistors are spaced about 2 nanometers apart — smaller spacing means more speed and less power draw). It claims 30% faster CPU performance. Read more

GitHub outage

A three-hour GitHub outage disrupted CI/CD pipelines (automated systems that test and deploy code) worldwide. Root cause was a database failover bug. Details
